# Step 05 — Post-Approval Actions

**Persona:** Purchaser (Purchasing Staff / Buyer)
**Module:** 1
**Section:** 1.5
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` (Approved status)

---

---

> **Session Note — 2026-04-26:**
> Live verification completed using fc@zebra.com (FC approver) and purchase@zebra.com (Purchaser).
> **Confirmed:** PO status after FC approval = SENT; auto-send is immediate; purchaser sees Close + Comment only.
> **Still TBC (requires test data):**
> - §1.5.7 Rejected PO view — no rejected PO available in test account
> - Partially received and fully received PO states
> - Void behaviour on close (requires a PO with zero received items to be closed live)

---
## 1.5.1 Access Path

1. Log in as `purchase@zebra.com`
2. Navigate to **Procurement → Purchase Order** in the left sidebar
3. Click any PO with **Approved** status in the list


---

## 1.5.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PO List"] --> create["2. Create PO"]
    create -->|"Blank / Manual"| detail["3. PO Detail"]
    create -->|"From Price List"| pricelist["2a. Price List Wizard"]
    create -->|"From PR"| frompr["2b. From PR Wizard"]
    pricelist --> detail
    frompr --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["4. Edit Mode"]
    edit -->|Submit| inprog(["IN PROGRESS — Pending FC Approval"])
    inprog -->|"FC Approves"| approved(["Approved"])
    approved --> postapproval["5. Post-Approval Actions"]
    style postapproval fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.5.3 Screen Layout (SENT Status — Confirmed)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← Purchase Order   PO20260400018   SENT                        │
│                                       [Close] [Comment]        │
│                                                                │
│ Date / Buyer / Department / Workflow (all read-only)           │
│                                                                │
│ Workflow Tracker                                               │
│  Previous: FC ──── Current: Completed                          │
│                                                                │
│ Items (1 item, status: APPROVED)                               │
│ ...                                                            │
│                                                                │
│ Totals Bar                                                     │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

After FC approval the PO status is **SENT**. The PO is automatically transmitted to the vendor at the moment of FC confirmation. No "Send to Vendor" button appears on the purchaser side.

![SENT PO — Purchaser View](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.5.4 Post-Approval Status Transition

| Previous Status | FC Action | Resulting Status | Purchaser View |
|-----------------|-----------|------------------|----------------|
| IN PROGRESS | FC Approves | **SENT** | PO is auto-sent to vendor; Purchaser sees Close + Comment only |
| IN PROGRESS | FC Sends Back | IN PROGRESS (returned) | Purchaser can revise and resubmit |
| IN PROGRESS | FC Rejects | Rejected | TBC — not captured in live UI |

The FC Approve dialog reads "Once approved, the PO will be sent to the vendor." Status after approval is **SENT**. Auto-send is immediate — there is no manual "Send to Vendor" step for the purchaser.

---

## 1.5.5 Auto-Send on FC Approval (Confirmed)

The PO is **automatically sent to the vendor** the moment the FC confirms approval. There is no "Send to Vendor" button on the purchaser side for a SENT PO.

**FC Approval Confirmation Dialog** (observed as fc@zebra.com):

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Approve Purchase Order" |
| Message | "Once approved, the PO will be sent to the vendor. Are you sure?" |
| **Approve** button (Blue/Primary) | Approves PO and triggers auto-send; status → SENT |
| **Cancel** button (Outline/Grey) | Dismisses dialog; PO remains IN PROGRESS |

**Result for Purchaser:** PO status changes to **SENT**. Available actions: Close, Comment only.

---

## 1.5.6 Close Action (TBC)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Close an approved PO once the order is no longer required. If no items have been received against the PO, the system records the closure as a **Void**. If items were partially or fully received before close, the PO is simply closed.

Approved POs can be **Closed** by the purchaser. The system sets the status to VOIDED when nothing was received at the time of closure.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PO status is Approved | — | Close option available | Option not shown |
| 2 | Purchaser confirms close | — | System checks received quantity (BR-10) | Dialog dismissed; no change |
| 3 | No items received (received qty = 0 on all lines) | BR-10 | PO status → VOIDED; no further actions | PO status → CLOSED; no further actions |

**Confirmation Dialog (Confirmed):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Close Purchase Order" |
| Message | "Are you sure you want to close this purchase order? Please provide a reason." |
| Reason field | Optional text, 0/256 characters |
| **Close** button (Blue/Primary) | Confirms close; PO voided (if nothing received) or closed |
| **Cancel** button (Outline/Grey) | Dismisses dialog; PO remains SENT |

![Close Purchase Order Dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.5.7 Rejected PO View (TBC)

When the FC rejects a PO, the Purchaser sees the PO in **Rejected** status.

| Element | Expected Behaviour |
|---------|-------------------|
| Status badge | Red "REJECTED" badge |
| Edit button | TBC — likely disabled or hidden |
| Delete button | TBC |
| Rejection reason | TBC — may display FC's rejection reason text |

---

## 1.5.8 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | Send to Vendor is only available when PO is Approved | FR-PO-005 lifecycle |
| BR-02 | Rejected POs cannot be edited or resubmitted | FR-PO-005 lifecycle |
| BR-03 | Close is the Purchaser-facing action on Approved POs; Void is not offered as a user action | FR-PO-005 |
| BR-04 | PO is auto-sent to vendor upon FC approval — no manual Send to Vendor step for purchaser | Confirmed 2026-04-26 (FC dialog + SENT status observed) |
| BR-05 | If a PO is closed or deleted with zero items received, the system records the outcome as VOIDED | FR-PO-005 void condition |

---

## 1.5.9 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Purchaser clicks Send to Vendor → Cancel | No action taken; PO remains Approved |
| Purchaser attempts to edit Approved PO | Edit button disabled or not shown (TBC) |
| Purchaser attempts to delete Approved PO | Delete not available (TBC) |
| FC auto-sends on approval | Send to Vendor step skipped; Purchaser may only see Sent status |
| Purchaser attempts to void an Approved PO | Void is not a user-facing action; Close is the correct action — system voids internally if nothing was received |
| Purchaser closes PO with no items received | System records status as VOIDED, not CLOSED |
| Purchaser closes PO with some items received | System records status as CLOSED; received items remain in inventory |
| PO is partially received | Status advances to Partial Received (per BRD lifecycle — not observed in live UI) |
| PO is fully received | Status advances to Fully Received (per BRD lifecycle — not observed in live UI) |

---

## 1.5.10 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click ← Purchase Order | Step 01 — PO List |
| Click Send to Vendor → Confirm | TBC — may remain on PO detail or return to list |
| Click Close → Confirm | TBC — likely returns to Step 01 — PO List |

---

## 1.5.11 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/send` | Send approved PO to vendor (TBC) |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/close` | Close an approved PO (TBC) |
